digest.headline: US Inflation Rate Hits 40-Year High
digest.summary: The US inflation rate surged to 6.8% in March, exceeding expectations. This marks a 40-year high, sparking concerns about economic stability.

digest.headline: Elon Musk's SpaceX Launches Starship Prototype
digest.summary: SpaceX successfully launched its Starship prototype on a high-altitude test flight, marking a crucial milestone in reusable space technology development. The test aims to demonstrate the spacecraft's ability to return to Earth intact.

digest.headline: WHO Declares Monkeypox Global Health Emergency
digest.summary: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared the ongoing monkeypox outbreak a global health emergency, citing the rapid spread of the disease. This designation triggers a coordinated international response to contain the outbreak.

digest.headline: EU Agrees on Historic Climate Change Deal
digest.summary: The European Union has reached a landmark agreement on a comprehensive climate change package, setting binding targets to reduce greenhouse gas emissions. The deal aims to align EU policies with the Paris Agreement goals.

digest.headline: Amazon Acquires Zappos Rival, Thrive Cosmetics
digest.summary: Amazon has acquired Thrive Cosmetics, a direct-to-consumer beauty brand, expanding its e-commerce presence in the lucrative skincare market. The deal is Amazon's latest move to strengthen its position in the beauty and personal care sector.

digest.headline: NASA's Perseverance Rover Discovers Ancient Lake Bed
digest.summary: NASA's Perseverance rover has discovered evidence of an ancient lake bed on Mars, providing valuable insights into the planet's past habitability. The finding supports the theory that Mars may have once been capable of supporting life.
